$comment: scripts/BikeShop.asm — the VOUCHER-for-BICYCLE trade (taking the voucher first frees the slot the BICYCLE lands in, the retired beat's bag ops), or the ¥1,000,000 pitch.

then.text:
How do you like
your BICYCLE? Isn't it great?
Oh, that's... A BIKE VOUCHER! OK! Here you go!

{player} exchanged
the BIKE VOUCHER
for a BICYCLE.

else.text:
Hi! Welcome to
the BICYCLE SHOP! Our bargain price
for that model is
¥1,000,000! Haha! No one can
afford that!
